## User needs

* As a person who is blind, or has low vision, or a cognitive or memory disability, I need to know if an image is decorative or informative so that I can decide if it's relevant to me.
* As a content author, I need to know when a tool I'm using has inserted automatically generated alternative text for an image in my content.
* As a person who is blind, I need access to the complex information conveyed visually by an image.
* As a person who is blind, I need an understandable description of the information or functionality conveyed by an image.
* [TODO] As a person who is blind, I need access to the non-visual content in an image such as alternative text, metadata, and the time a photograph was taken.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need access to the information conveyed by images of text.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need access to any text in an image that conveys important information.
* As a person who is blind or has low vision, I need to know when the styling or presentation of text conveys important meaning.
* As a person who is blind, or has low vision, or a cognitive or learning disability, I need to understand how an image relates to the surrounding context.
* As a person who is blind, or has low vision, or a cognitive or learning disability, I need to understand the implied meaning or purpose an image conveys when it's used in a particular context.
* As a person who is blind, or has low vision, or a cognitive or learning disability, I need image descriptions to match the surrounding content.
* As a person who is blind, or has low vision, or a cognitive or learning disability, I need image descriptions to match the tone and structure of the surrounding content.
* As a person who is blind, or has low vision, or a cognitive or learning disability, I need image descriptions to convey the same information and meaning that other users obtain from viewing these images.
* [TODO] As a user, I need to personalize text description for example to alter content that may otherwise be disturbing, harmful or offensive.  Summarizations. Translations. Simplification.
* As a  person who is blind, I need to know if the image is a photograph so that I can ask somebody to describe the photo.
* As a person who is deaf, hard of hearing, or blind, or who has low vision, or a motor, cognitive or learning disability, I need content to be available in multiple ways and formats.
* As a person who is blind, or has low vision, or a cognitive or learning disability, I need to understand the message conveyed in a data visualization.
* As a person who is blind, or has low vision, or a cognitive or learning disability, I need to be able to find information in a data visualization so that I can complete a task or answer a question.
* As a person with a cognitive disability, I need the information presented in an interactive data visualization to be simplified.
